action.reasoning: Observation: workspace is empty. Analysis: need a valid end-to-end HumanoidBench pipeline immediately, including fixed-shape multi-task observations so evaluation across all 10 differing obs dims will not fail. Decision: implement padded-observation PPO baseline trained briefly on all 10 h1hand tasks, save SB3 checkpoint, create deterministic predict.py, and submit eval to validate pipeline/time.
